title: senecio molinae
intro: Senecio molinae, also known as Ragwort or Groundsel, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio molinae include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Senecio molinae can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
